description: Complete Chart Decoder codebase export for external analysis

chartShapes.purpose: Detects the overall shape/pattern formed by planetary distribution (Bowl, Bucket, Bundle, Locomotive, Seesaw, Splash, Splay)

Bowl.description: All planets occupy 180° or less of the zodiac, leaving half the chart empty.
Bowl.personality: You are a CONTAINER. Your energy is focused, directed, and purposeful. You carry a half of life within you that you've mastered, while perpetually gazing at the empty half—the unlived life, the unexplored territory.
Bowl.gift: Concentrated focus, clear purpose, ability to hold and contain energy, self-containment
Bowl.challenge: Obsession with what's missing, feeling incomplete, projection onto others who represent the empty half

Bucket.description: A Bowl pattern with one planet (the 'handle') isolated on the opposite side.
Bucket.personality: You have focused energy (the Bowl) with a SINGLE OUTLET (the handle planet). All your concentrated power flows through one channel. The handle planet is your point of release.
Bucket.gift: Powerful focus with a clear outlet, ability to channel concentrated energy, distinctive impact point
Bucket.challenge: Over-reliance on the handle planet, if that area is blocked you feel stuck

Bundle.description: All planets are concentrated within 120° or less (one-third of the zodiac).
Bundle.personality: You are INTENSELY SPECIALIZED. Your entire being is focused on one area of life. You have laser focus, deep expertise, and powerful concentration.
Bundle.gift: Extreme specialization, mastery of a focused area, powerful concentration of energy
Bundle.challenge: Lack of perspective, difficulty with areas outside your focus, potential for obsession

Locomotive.description: Planets span about 240° (two-thirds of zodiac), leaving one-third empty.
Locomotive.personality: You are a TRAIN—powerful, driven, always moving toward the empty space. The leading planet drives the whole engine. You have momentum, purpose, and an endless drive to fill what's missing.
Locomotive.gift: Tremendous drive, self-motivation, ability to pull others along, natural momentum
Locomotive.challenge: Never satisfied, always chasing, difficulty resting, can run over obstacles (and people)

Seesaw.description: Planets form two groups roughly opposite each other, with two empty areas.
Seesaw.personality: You live in POLARITIES. You see both sides of everything, swing between opposites, and seek balance through oscillation. You are the diplomat, the mediator.
Seesaw.gift: Objectivity, ability to see all perspectives, diplomatic skills, balance through integration of opposites
Seesaw.challenge: Indecision, feeling pulled apart, projection, difficulty committing to one path

Splash.description: Planets are scattered relatively evenly around the entire zodiac.
Splash.personality: You are a RENAISSANCE SOUL. You have fingers in every pie, interests in every direction, and the ability to engage with all of life.
Splash.gift: Versatility, adaptability, broad competence, ability to understand and engage with anything
Splash.challenge: Scattered energy, jack of all trades/master of none, difficulty focusing

Splay.description: Planets form irregular clusters (stelliums) with uneven spacing.
Splay.personality: You are an INDIVIDUAL. You don't fit patterns. Your chart has distinct power centers (the clusters) and gaps. You are strong-willed and independent.
Splay.gift: Individuality, strong will, ability to resist conformity, distinct power centers
Splay.challenge: Stubbornness, difficulty cooperating, uneven development, gaps in life experience

detectionLogic.splayCondition: 2+ stelliums OR (1+ stellium AND 2+ significant gaps)

hemisphereAnalysis.purpose: Analyzes the distribution of planets across the chart's four quadrants and two hemispheres

Q1.description: Houses 1-3: Personal identity, resources, and communication. This is the most PERSONAL quadrant—about discovering and expressing who YOU are.
Q1.heavyMeaning: Your life journey centers on discovering your identity, building your resources, and finding your voice. You learn best through personal experience.

Q2.description: Houses 4-6: Home, creativity, and daily work. This quadrant is about creating FOUNDATIONS—emotional security, creative expression, and meaningful work.
Q2.heavyMeaning: Your life journey centers on building a home, expressing creativity, and perfecting your craft. You need solid foundations before you can expand outward.

Q3.description: Houses 7-9: Partnership, transformation, and higher learning. This quadrant is about growing through OTHERS—relationships, depth work, and expanded horizons.
Q3.heavyMeaning: Your life journey centers on partnerships, deep transformation, and discovering meaning through broader perspectives.

Q4.description: Houses 10-12: Public role, community, and transcendence. This quadrant is about your CONTRIBUTION—what you leave behind, how you serve the collective.
Q4.heavyMeaning: Your life journey centers on public achievement, community involvement, and spiritual transcendence.

upper.heavyMeaning: You are meant to be visible, public-facing, and engaged with the outer world. Your purpose unfolds in relationships, career, and collective involvement.

lower.heavyMeaning: You are meant to be more private, internal, and focused on personal development. Your purpose unfolds through self-discovery, building foundations, and perfecting your craft.

eastern.heavyMeaning: You are meant to INITIATE—to act from your own will, to start things, to lead. You don't wait for permission. Your life is self-directed.

western.heavyMeaning: You are meant to RESPOND—to collaborate, to partner, to let others initiate. You find yourself through relationship and reaction.

cinematicNarrative.purpose: Tells the story of planets as characters in your personal movie using WHO/HOW/WHERE framework

Sun.archetype: The Hero on their journey—the main character whose growth IS the story

Moon.archetype: The heart of the story—providing emotional depth, personal drama, and the internal world

Mercury.archetype: The voice that tells the story—how thoughts become words

Venus.archetype: What makes life beautiful and worth living—love, pleasure, aesthetics, values

Mars.archetype: The drive, the fight scenes, the courage to act—where things get physical

Jupiter.archetype: The figure who expands horizons, offers wisdom, and represents growth and meaning

Saturn.archetype: The challenges that force growth—limitations, responsibilities, and hard-won mastery

Uranus.archetype: The unexpected twist—rebellion, innovation, sudden change

Pluto.archetype: The death and rebirth—power, intensity, what must be destroyed for new life

Chiron.archetype: The core wound that becomes wisdom—pain transformed into the ability to help others

NorthNode.archetype: Where the story is GOING—the growth direction, the soul's purpose

Aries.costume: an instinct to act before thinking

Taurus.costume: a need for stability before risk

Gemini.costume: a mind that needs constant input

Cancer.costume: an emotional radar scanning for safety

Leo.costume: a need to be seen and appreciated

Virgo.costume: an eye that catches what others miss

Libra.costume: a nervous system calibrated to other people

Scorpio.costume: a psychological x-ray that sees beneath surfaces

Capricorn.costume: an awareness of how you appear to authority

Aquarius.costume: a need to be different from the group

4.stage: The Private Home — Behind Closed Doors

12.stage: The Hidden Room — Behind the Veil

planetDignities.purpose: Complete astrological reference data for dignities, terms, decans, and planetary speeds

planetaryCondition.purpose: Traditional astrological techniques for assessing planetary strength and support

characterSynthesis.purpose: Deep analysis of Sun/Moon/Rising interaction with full decan, element, modality, and house integration

tripleElementCombinations.Fire: Triple Fire creates an unstoppable force of pure yang energy. Unstoppable inspiration, magnetic leadership.
tripleElementCombinations.Earth: Triple Earth creates an unshakeable foundation. Incredible manifesting power, patience that outlasts everything.
tripleElementCombinations.Air: Triple Air creates pure mind—a being of thoughts, connections, and endless intellectual curiosity.
tripleElementCombinations.Water: Triple Water creates oceanic emotional depth. Profound empathy, artistic/healing genius, psychic sensitivity.

tripleModalityCombinations.Cardinal: Triple Cardinal creates pure initiating force. Maximum action orientation—you ARE the spark.
tripleModalityCombinations.Fixed: Triple Fixed creates absolute determination incarnate. Maximum persistence—you ARE stability itself.
tripleModalityCombinations.Mutable: Triple Mutable creates pure adaptability—a shapeshifter who flows with every current.

chartDecoderLogic.purpose: Core logic for computing dignity, dispositor chains, aspects, and interpretations

planetMeanings.Sun: Identity, vitality, confidence, purpose, and how you lead with your will.
planetMeanings.Moon: Emotions, needs, nervous system comfort, attachment patterns, and what refuels you.
planetMeanings.Venus: Love style, values, aesthetics, money patterns, what you're drawn to.
planetMeanings.Mars: Drive, boundaries, anger, courage, how you initiate.
planetMeanings.Jupiter: Growth, faith, opportunity, meaning, mentors, expansion.
planetMeanings.Saturn: Discipline, fear, mastery, responsibility, long-term building.
planetMeanings.Neptune: Intuition, ideals, imagination, spirituality, fog/escapism patterns.
planetMeanings.Chiron: Core wound and healing gift — where pain becomes wisdom.
planetMeanings.NorthNode: Soul direction, growth edge, what feels unfamiliar but calling.

subComponents: BirthConditionsDisplay.tsx - Shows lunar phase, sect, and planetary hours at birth
ChartCastOverview.tsx - Overview of all planetary characters with quick summaries
ChartInputSection.tsx - Input form for chart data
ChartRulerDeepDive.tsx - Deep analysis of the chart ruler
DignityDistribution.tsx - Visual distribution of dignities across the chart
DignityTable.tsx - Table showing all planets with their dignities
DispositorMap.tsx - Visual map showing who reports to whom
HighestPotentialSynthesis.tsx - Synthesis of chart's highest potentials
HouseLordAnalysis.tsx - Analysis of house lords and their placements
MostPowerfulPlanetCard.tsx - Card showing the most powerful planet
NatalAspectsSummary.tsx - Summary of all natal aspects
PlanetDetailCard.tsx - Detailed card for a selected planet
PlanetIconGrid.tsx - Grid of planet icons for selection
PlanetPowerRanking.tsx - Ranking of planets by power/condition
PlanetSpotlightModal.tsx - Modal for detailed planet spotlight
PlanetaryConditionDashboard.tsx - Dashboard showing all planetary conditions
ProgressedMoonTimeline.tsx - Timeline of progressed Moon through signs
ProgressionsDisplay.tsx - Display of secondary progressions
QuadrantAnalysisDisplay.tsx - Visual quadrant and hemisphere analysis
QuadrantSummaryBadge.tsx - Quick summary badge for quadrant distribution
ReadingScriptGenerator.tsx - Generates reading script for practitioners
SectAnalysisCard.tsx - Card showing sect analysis (day/night chart)
SectLightActivationsCard.tsx - Card showing sect light activations
WhereLifeHelpsCard.tsx - Card showing areas where life naturally supports

tabs.overview: Birth conditions, cast overview, and quick summary narrative
tabs.characters: Planet selection grid, detailed planet cards, dignity table
tabs.relationships: Dispositor map, aspect chemistry (allies and rivals)
tabs.progressions: Progressed Moon timeline, secondary progressions, chart ruler deep dive
tabs.patterns: Quadrant analysis, hemisphere distribution, chart shape pattern
tabs.synthesis: Highest potential synthesis, well-placed planets, contentment indicators
